subcodes.first_line: The effulgent lights of the Divine Day have illumined the world, and the signs of His manifestation, through His gracious bounty, have become evident from all directions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انوار یوم الهی عالم را منور نموده و آثار ظهور بعنایتش از جمیع جهات هویدا مع
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
